evidence.title: README (segment 2)
evidence.excerpt: [302.AI](https://share.302.ai/oUDqQ6) is a pay-as-you-go enterprise AI resource hub that offers the latest and most comprehensive AI models and APIs on the market, along with a variety of ready-to-use online AI applications.

evidence.title: README (segment 3)
evidence.excerpt: [**n1n.ai**](https://api.n1n.ai/register?channel=c_ivgzug0w) — Global LLM API Gateway. One API Key to access 500+ top AI models (GPT-5, Claude 4.5, Gemini 3 Pro, and more).

evidence.title: README (segment 4)
evidence.excerpt: A multi-model collaboration development system where Claude Code orchestrates Codex + Gemini. Frontend tasks route to Gemini, backend tasks route to Codex, and Claude handles orchestration and code review.

evidence.title: README (segment 5)
evidence.excerpt: - **Zero-config model routing** — Frontend tasks automatically go to Gemini, backend tasks to Codex. No manual switching. - **Security by design** — External models have no write access. They return patches; Claude reviews before applying. - **29+ slash commands** — From planning to execution, git workflow to code review, all accessible via `/ccg:*`. - **Spec-driven development** — Integrates [OPSX](https://github.com/fission-ai/opsx) to turn vague requirements into verifiable constraints, eliminating AI improvisation.

evidence.title: README (segment 6)
evidence.excerpt: ``` Claude Code (Orchestrator) │ ┌───┴───┐ ↓ ↓ Codex Gemini (Backend) (Frontend) │ │ └───┬───┘ ↓ Unified Patch ```

evidence.title: README (segment 7)
evidence.excerpt: External models have no write access — they only return patches, which Claude reviews before applying.

evidence.title: README (segment 8)
evidence.excerpt: > **🎬 [See CCG in action →](https://x.com/CCG_Workflow/status/2038923720610463876)** — Real multi-model collaboration demo on X

evidence.title: preset
evidence.excerpt: Pre-compiled `codeagent-wrapper` binaries for all supported platforms. Automatically downloaded during `npx ccg-workflow` installation. | File | Platform | Architecture | |------|----------|-------------| | `codeagent-wrapper-darwin-amd64` | macOS | Intel x64 | | `codeagent-wrapper-darwin-arm64` | macOS | Apple Silicon | | `codeagent-wrapper-linux-amd64` | Linux | x64 | | `codeagent-wrapper-linux-arm64` | Linux | ARM64 | | `codeagent-wrapper-windows-amd64.exe` | Windows | x64 | | `codeagent-wrapper-windows-arm64.exe` | Windows | ARM64 | > This release is automatically updated when `codeagent-wrapper/` source changes. > Mirror: Cloudflare R2 (auto-synced)
